Our Mission

Built on Service,
Driven by Knowledge

Patriot Scholar Press exists to publish books that matter — works of practical wisdom, academic rigor, and patriotic conviction that help Americans of all ages navigate life with purpose and clarity.

Founded in New Braunfels, Texas, Patriot Scholar Press is an imprint of MJHW Group Enterprises, LLC. We believe that education and service to country are not competing values — they are the same value, expressed differently.

From practical guides for young adults stepping into the world after high school to scholarly works on law enforcement, leadership, and American civic life — every title we publish carries a message worth passing on.

An imprint of MJHW Group Enterprises, LLC · New Braunfels, Texas

Featured Release · 2024

Chasing the Dream: Strategies for Success After High School

Dr. John Harrison Watts, PhD

A practical, faith-rooted guide for young adults at life's crossroads. Drawing on decades of service as a police officer, soldier, professor, and city commissioner, Dr. Watts delivers actionable strategies for navigating college, career, investment, and purpose.

The Rise of Specialized Police in the United States

John Harrison Watts

About Dr. Watts

“Your limitations don’t define you — your drive does.”

Dr. John Harrison Watts has lived the American Dream in every sense. A decorated police officer, U.S. Army soldier, Texas State Guard Warrant Officer (CW3), university professor, city commissioner, and entrepreneur — Dr. Watts brings a uniquely multidimensional perspective to everything he writes and every stage he graces.

He holds a PhD and has spent his career not only serving his community but mentoring the next generation of scholars, leaders, and patriots through the McNair Scholars Program and graduate education. He is the founder of The Conflict Ref, LLC, and the driving intellectual force behind Patriot Scholar Press.

Dr. Watts resides in Texas, where he continues to teach, write, mentor, and chase a few dreams of his own.

Law Enforcement & Public Safety
Military Leadership
Higher Education & Mentoring
Real Estate & Entrepreneurship
City Government & Civic Leadership
Youth Motivation & Life Strategies
Read His Books Book Dr. Watts to Speak

Speaking Engagements

Bring Dr. Watts to Your StageInspiring audiences from classrooms to conference halls

Dr. John Harrison Watts is an electrifying and deeply credentialed speaker whose life story — from patrol officer to PhD, from soldier to professor — commands a room. He delivers keynotes, workshops, and commencement addresses that leave audiences ready to act.

Whether you’re planning a leadership summit, a university convocation, law enforcement training, or a community event, Dr. Watts brings energy, expertise, and authenticity to every engagement.
